name: Luenmei Quantum Co.,Ltd
summary: Luenmei Quantum Co.,Ltd engages in heat supplying and heat power grid installation businesses in China. It is also involved in enterprise assets management and civil engineering construction operations. The company was formerly known as Luenmei Holding Co., Ltd and changed its name to Luenmei Quantum Co.,Ltd in November 2016. Luenmei Quantum Co.,Ltd is based in Shenyang, China. As on October 25, 2018, Luenmei Quantum Co.,Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Lianzhong New Energy Co., Ltd.
